notes: IEEE Xplore hosts electrical engineering and computer science research. Papers identified by numeric document ID.

match_nodes.description: IEEE Xplore document ID (7-8 digit numeric identifier)

data.description: IEEE Xplore paper identified by numeric document ID.
data.notes: IEEE Xplore document IDs are assigned sequentially. The same paper may also have a DOI (typically 10.1109/prefix). IEEE publishes standards (e.g., 802.11) in addition to conference and journal papers.
